_metadata.title: The Shadow Nine: Pre-computed Match Results
_metadata.description: For every MLB player in the pool, the best-matching NLB player at their position with similarity score, stat comparison, narrative, alternates, and confidence tier. All similarity scores computed from real statistics using Euclidean distance on normalized stat vectors.

methodology.algorithm: Position-filtered Euclidean distance on normalized stat vectors
methodology.normalization: Min-max within position group across both leagues

confidence_tiers.Moderate: Score 60-79, or Strong score with low coverage
confidence_tiers.Weak: Score < 60, or moderate score with low coverage

primary.narrative: Biz Mackey played in the Negro Leagues from 1920-1947, posting a .324/.47 BA/SLG profile in documented seasons. The statistical match to Johnny Bench (similarity 77) reflects similar overall offensive value despite different batting profiles, and similar power production. Source: Seamheads Negro Leagues Database, career record.
primary.source: Seamheads Negro Leagues Database, career record

alternates.name: Josh Gibson
alternates.summary: 1930-1946. 60.2 career WAR (Seamheads). Hall of Fame inducted.
